- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Build a lightweight Markdown previewer in the current workspace for one uploaded `.md` file with simple deployment.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Created a plain static web app in the current directory using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Added single-file upload, drag and drop, a raw Markdown editor, live preview, and sanitised HTML rendering.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  No extensions were needed.

- [x] Compile the Project
  No compile step is required for this static app. Editor diagnostics for the project files are clean.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  No VS Code task is needed because the app has no build or server requirement.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Opened the app locally in the integrated browser. No debug launch flow was required.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  README is present and current, and this file has been cleaned up to remove template comments.

- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
